component.name: AI Usage Monitor
component.summary: KDE Plasma widget to monitor AI API usage, rate limits, and costs

description.p: AI Usage Monitor is a Plasma 6 widget for tracking AI provider usage, estimated cost, rate limits, budget thresholds, and subscription-tool limits directly from the panel.
It supports multiple hosted AI providers, local history, compare analytics, export options, notification controls, and subscription-tool monitoring for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and GitHub Copilot.

screenshot.caption: Live dashboard with connected provider cards and cost summaries
Compact panel representation with status badge
Configuration-oriented view used for provider and budget setup
